title: 80-lesson milestone: speed gate
description: Speed gate at lesson 80 — must hold 80 WPM
text: Eighty lessons. You are no longer typing — you are translating thought directly into text. Most people will never feel this. From here, every lesson refines what you already have: sustained accuracy at speed, calm hands, and total trust in muscle memory. The last twenty lessons are pure polish.

tips.text: 80 WPM = top 5% of typists in the world
Pass this gate = you can outpace most people's spoken words

character_tips.anna: 🎯 80 WPM gate. Top 5% globally. The world's average is 40 WPM — you're double.
character_tips.maxim: 80 WPM sustained is the elite professional level. Carry this forward.
character_tips.klavochka: My star, you're soaring! ⭐ Twenty lessons to legend!
